posts.author: TicketReseller84
posts.text: 🚨 EXCLUSIVE DEAL ALERT! 🚨 Get your tickets to the big summer festival for just £12 each! Limited stock available now at https://ticket-market-zone.net/flash-sale. Don't miss out on these amazing prices! #FestivalDeals #SummerVibes
posts.explanation: This post promotes suspicious ticket resale requiring authentication to verify the source and pricing.
